title: Year overview in Calender view
excerpt: In our Marketing team, we create year planners to inform other departments (and in our case all our hotels) what we will be focussing on the upcoming year. We normally just create it in Excel and as a printed design in I…

posts.author: mariellep (Marielle)
posts.cookedHtml: In our Marketing team, we create year planners to inform other departments (and in our case all our hotels) what we will be focussing on the upcoming year. We normally just create it in Excel and as a printed design in InDesign, but I would love to be able to build this year calendar in Monday.com. That way we can track our progress, but also easily look at what’s ahead of us.

posts.author: robins (Robin Scott)
posts.cookedHtml: I came here to request this as well. My company has product releases to do and being able to see the full year would help us plan out what product is released when.

posts.author: Claudia413 (Claudia E)
posts.cookedHtml:
I personally also love a year overview, especially to keep the overview for projects coming up in a few months.
If you’re still looking for a way to see this, I can recommend Calendar Plus in the marketplace (free to use): https://monday.com/marketplace/10000475

Disclaimer: I helped build it so I might be a bit biased
